# Explore this app with the Suluk extension

Install **Suluk — OpenAPI v4 (Candidate)** (publisher: MahmoodKhalil), then **open `openapi.json`** at the
repo root. The Suluk sidebar (Cycle + Builder) fills with every layer of this API — data, contract, auth,
cost, docs, state, UI, tests — all derived from that one document. Try **View as** (scopes) and the
**Generate** actions.

The doc is the live contract of the deployed Worker (https://saasuluk.saastemly.com/openapi.json); regenerate
it with `curl -s https://saasuluk.saastemly.com/openapi.json -o openapi.json`.
